scripts.db:deploy: CHECKPOINT_DISABLE=1 PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1 prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: CHECKPOINT_DISABLE=1 PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1 prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: CHECKPOINT_DISABLE=1 PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1 prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: CHECKPOINT_DISABLE=1 PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1 prisma db seed --schema prisma/schema.prisma
